source: Endeavour FY-2026 guidance (mine-level production, AISC, and sustaining+non-sustaining mine capital) supplemented with Hounde 2022 site-visit production outlook target (~250koz/year over +10 years) for FY-2027-FY-2030; Assafou project start timing and capital estimate from investor presentation (first gold H2-2028, capital estimate ~$734M).

assets.name: Assafo-Dibibango
assets.notes: Open-pit heap-leach operation. Production schedule shifted so first production begins in 2028 (Year3 with startYear=2026), consistent with investor presentation first-gold timing (H2-2028). Capex profile is front-loaded to reflect construction: Year1-Year3 totals ~$734M (investor presentation capital estimate), then lower post-start capex in Year4-Year5; LOM sustaining capex reference remains ~$312M.

assets.name: Hounde
assets.notes: FY-2026 production and AISC guidance midpoints used for Year1. FY-2027-FY-2030 production set to the 2022 site-visit target (~250koz/yr over +10 years). Capex uses FY-2026 sustaining + non-sustaining mine capital guidance ($50M + $60M) spread evenly across the modeled years via Sustaining_Total.

assets.name: Ity
assets.notes: FY-2026 production and AISC guidance midpoints used; FY-2027-FY-2030 held flat (simplified). Capex uses FY-2026 sustaining + non-sustaining mine capital guidance ($40M + $45M) spread evenly across the modeled years via Sustaining_Total.

assets.name: Mana
assets.notes: FY-2026 production and AISC guidance midpoints used; FY-2027-FY-2030 held flat (simplified). Capex uses FY-2026 sustaining + non-sustaining mine capital guidance ($60M + $10M) spread evenly across the modeled years via Sustaining_Total.

assets.name: Sabodala-Massawa
assets.notes: FY-2026 production and AISC guidance midpoints used; FY-2027-FY-2030 held flat (simplified). Capex uses FY-2026 sustaining + non-sustaining mine capital guidance ($50M + $30M) spread evenly across the modeled years via Sustaining_Total.

assets.name: Lafigue
assets.notes: FY-2026 production and AISC guidance midpoints used; FY-2027-FY-2030 held flat (simplified). Capex uses FY-2026 sustaining + non-sustaining mine capital guidance ($30M + $90M) spread evenly across the modeled years via Sustaining_Total.
